sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18005" key="au)to/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτό-φρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">φρονος</itype>, <sense id="n18005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁμόφρων</ref></xr>, Ion Trag. ap. <title_ TEIform="title">Lex.Sabb.</title_> </sense> </entryFree>
